description_long: This is a modern grave monument featuring a polished black granite headstone with a rounded top, set on a reddish-brown stone base. The headstone displays an engraved portrait, Cyrillic inscriptions, and dates, indicating it is a personalized memorial. In front of the headstone, there is a rectangular grave plot bordered by black stone, with a green artificial turf or grass insert. A decorative black urn or vase is positioned on the left side of the base, likely for flowers or offerings. The materials and finish suggest durability and a solemn, respectful appearance. The overall design is clean, with sharp lines and a combination of smooth and matte surfaces.
description: A polished black granite headstone with engraved portrait and inscriptions, set on a reddish-brown stone base, with a bordered grave plot and a decorative black urn.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the headstone, the reddish-brown base, and the black urn on the left.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the engraved portrait, Cyrillic inscriptions, and the full layout of the grave plot with urn.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the headstone's thickness, base, and urn on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain back of the headstone and the reddish-brown base.
attribute_tombstone_inscriptions: Все будет так, как должно быть. Прочти и запомни.
